2025-06-02.title: Day 0
2025-06-02.message: Just for testing. If you can read this, our little love project is finally working

2026-06-15.title: Day 1
2026-06-15.message: Happy Birthday, Bandar....Aaj ka din mere liye bahut special hai, because it's the day my favorite person came into this world...Thank you for all the love, care, patience, and countless smiles you bring into my life. Even though we're miles apart, you still make me feel loved every single day. I wish this year brings you success, happiness, good health, and everything your heart desires. And no matter what happens, always remember that there is a girl somewhere who loves you more than words can explain.Stay the amazing, kind, funny, and caring person you are.Happy Birthday, my love. Here's to many more memories, adventures, and birthdays together.Forever yours,Your Princess

2026-06-16.title: Day 2
2026-06-16.message: I hope today reminds you how deeply loved you are.

2026-06-17.title: Day 3
2026-06-17.message: One of my favorite memories is our Puri beach time together.

2026-06-18.title: Day 4
2026-06-18.message: Thank you for being my comfort person.

2026-06-19.title: Day 5
2026-06-19.message: Even from far away, you still feel like home to me.

2026-06-20.title: Day 6
2026-06-20.message: I still smile whenever I remember our beach moments together.

2026-06-21.title: Day 7
2026-06-21.message: I love how we never stay angry at each other for too long.

2026-06-22.title: Day 8
2026-06-22.message: No matter how stressful life gets, talking to you feels peaceful.

2026-06-23.title: Day 9
2026-06-23.message: I hope someday we read all these messages together and laugh.

2026-06-24.title: Day 10
2026-06-24.message: You are one of the best things that ever happened to me.

2026-06-25.title: Day 11
2026-06-25.message: Long distance is hard, but loving you is always easy.

2026-06-26.title: Day 12
2026-06-26.message: I secretly replay our happiest memories in my mind all the time.

2026-06-27.title: Day 13
2026-06-27.message: I hope today gives you at least one reason to smile.

2026-06-28.title: Day 14
2026-06-28.message: No matter where life takes us, a part of me will always belong with you.

2026-06-29.title: Day 15
2026-06-29.message: You make ordinary days feel special without even trying.
